biography: PURUM is an interdisciplinary artist working at the intersection of brutalist sculpture, low-frequency sound art, and structural industrialism. Rooted in the Berlin underground scene, their work focuses on physical tension, raw materials, and the aesthetics of dark professionalism.
artistStatement: We reject decorative embellishment. Architecture is sound; concrete is texture; steel is tension. My work aims to expose the underlying skeleton of physical and digital environments, utilizing asymmetry, heavy contrast, and mechanical repetition.
